allow: Bash(docker-compose up -d && sleep 5 && docker-compose exec api rails db:seed 2>&1)
Bash(docker-compose exec api printenv ANTHROPIC_API_KEY | wc -c 2>&1)
Bash(docker-compose exec api bundle exec ruby -e "require 'anthropic'; c = Anthropic::Client.new; puts c.class" 2>&1)
Bash(docker-compose exec api sh -c 'cat $\(bundle show anthropic\)/lib/anthropic.rb' 2>&1 | grep -A 10 "access_token")

Bash(docker-compose restart api 2>&1 && sleep 6 && docker-compose exec api bundle exec ruby -e "require 'rails'; require_relative '/rails/config/environment'; c = Anthropic::Client.new; puts 'Client OK: ' + c.class.to_s" 2>&1)
